ccel.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix
ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.text: But the Ebionæans assert that the world is made by the true God, and they speak of Christ in a similar manner with Cerinthus.
They live, however, in all respects according to the law of Moses, alleging that they are thus justified.
